title: FSI Submission JSONL Record
description: Each line of 모델변경전.jsonl / 모델변경후.jsonl is a JSON object matching this schema. The schema mirrors the contract enforced at runtime by fsi_bench.py:validate_side() and run_benchmark.sh:make_submission(). Sidecar metadata (stop_reason, token counts) lives in *.metadata.jsonl and is OUT OF SCOPE for this schema — the deliverable JSONL must contain ONLY these three fields.

Index.description: 3-digit zero-padded prompt index in the range 001..300, joinable with metadata sidecar by exact string match.

model.description: Bedrock model ID (must be an inference profile per ADR-0001, prefix eu./us./global./apac.).

response.description: Full model response text. May be empty if the model returned no content (rare; see classify() empty class).
